name: mycoplasma_genitalium
description: Mycoplasma genitalium recipe translated from ccsb-scripps/MycoplasmaGenitalium (Maritan et al., JMB 2022). 536 interior + 94 surface species. Each protein ingredient is a Van der Waals surface mesh built from the corresponding PDB/CIF by scripts/translate_mycoplasma.py. The cell is approximated as a 2000 Å sphere compartment with surface lipid placements as a synthetic bilayer.
